common.tagline: Train Your Brain, Lower Your Brain Age

hero.title: Discover Your Brain's True Age
hero.subtitle: Science-based brain training to sharpen memory, focus, and cognition

brainAge.title: Brain Age Assessment
brainAge.description: Measure your cognitive performance across 5 dimensions

games.title: Science-Based Games
games.description: 18+ games designed by cognitive science principles

about.title: About BrainVerse
about.missionDescription: BrainVerse is dedicated to making science-based brain training accessible to everyone. We believe that cognitive health is a lifelong journey, and our mission is to help you understand and improve your brain's true potential.
about.technologyDescription: Built on modern web technology with a serverless architecture on Cloudflare's global edge network. We use evidence-based cognitive paradigms to deliver effective training.
about.scienceDescription: Our games are inspired by well-established cognitive paradigms including the Stroop test, digit span memory tasks, visual search experiments, and spatial memory research.
about.storyDescription: BrainVerse was created to bring lab-grade cognitive assessment to the browser. We combine rigorous science with delightful design to make brain training a daily habit.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have a question, suggestion, or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.emailDescription: Reach us at the address below for any inquiries.
contact.responseTime: We typically respond within 1-2 business days.

dashboard.loginRequired: Please sign in to view your dashboard
dashboard.loginRequiredDescription: Your dashboard shows your brain age, scores, streaks, and recent activity.

profile.loginRequired: Please sign in to view your profile
profile.loginRequiredDescription: Your profile contains your personal information, preferences, and training history.

achievements.loginRequired: Please sign in to view your achievements
achievements.loginRequiredDescription: Track your milestones, badges, and progress over time.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how BrainVerse (“we”, “us”, or “our”) collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our website and services.
privacy.dataWeCollectDescription: We collect the information you provide when creating an account, such as your email address and nickname, as well as gameplay data used to compute your brain age and progress.
privacy.howWeUseDescription: Your information is used to provide and improve our services, personalize your experience, analyze usage patterns, and communicate with you about your account.
privacy.dataSharingDescription: We do not sell or rent your personal information. We may share aggregated, non-identifiable data with analytics providers to understand how the service is used.
privacy.dataSecurityDescription: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information, including encryption in transit and at rest.
privacy.yourRightsDescription: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us.
privacy.cookiesDescription: We use cookies and similar technologies to operate the site and analyze traffic. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time via the consent banner.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of the BrainVerse website and services. By using our services, you agree to these terms.
terms.acceptanceDescription: By accessing or using BrainVerse, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.useOfServiceDescription: You agree to use BrainVerse only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not infringe the rights of others or restrict their use of the service.
terms.accountsDescription: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.
terms.intellectualPropertyDescription: All content on BrainVerse, including text, graphics, logos, and software, is the property of BrainVerse or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws.
terms.disclaimerDescription: BrainVerse provides brain training games for entertainment and educational purposes only. Our services are not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
terms.liabilityDescription: BrainVerse shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
terms.changesDescription: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes by posting the new Terms on this page.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

cookie.title: We Value Your Privacy
cookie.description: We use cookies to enhance your experience, analyze traffic, and personalize content. Choose your preferences below.
cookie.strictlyNecessaryDescription: These cookies are essential for the website to function.
cookie.performanceAnalyticsDescription: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the website.
cookie.targetingAdsDescription: These cookies are used to deliver relevant ads.
